name: RainLoop
tagline: Rainloop is a simple, modern & fast web-based email client. For initial configuration, see https://www.rainloop.net/docs/configuration/
description:
Rainloop is a simple, modern & fast web-based email client. For initial configuration, see https://www.rainloop.net/docs/configuration/


_Template derived from caprover/one-click-apps (caprover@bd357c9, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  rainloop:
    image: hardware/rainloop:1.12.0
    restart: unless-stopped
    volumes:
      - rainloop-data:/rainloop/data
    ports:
      - 42100:8888
volumes:
  rainloop-data: null
